last_cycle.summary: Q180 done: AND-frac parity audit across 6 L1 accent groups. Group-level r(L*/L,WER)=-0.986. Parity gap 0.157 ≈ WER gap 0.164. ar-en worst in both. Pre-deployment fairness screen validated.
